query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `runsheets` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `bookingId` int NOT NULL,
  `ownerId` int NOT NULL,
  `token` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `notes` text,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `runsheets_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `runsheets_token_unique` UNIQUE(`token`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `runsheet_items` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `runsheetId` int NOT NULL,
  `time` varchar(10) NOT NULL,
  `duration` int DEFAULT 30,
  `title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `assignedTo` varchar(255),
  `category` enum('setup','guest','food','beverage','speech','entertainment','packdown','other') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'other',
  `sortOrder` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  CONSTRAINT `runsheet_items_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
